metadata.description: Agent skills for Toolforest MCP toolkits — Google Slides, Docs, Sheets, and more.

plugins.name: google-slides-toolforest
plugins.description: Best practices for building Google Slides presentations via Toolforest MCP. Includes design patterns, font guidance, chart pipelines, image encoding gotchas, and slide verification checklists.

plugins.name: google-sheets-toolforest
plugins.description: Best practices for building Google Sheets via Toolforest MCP. Theme presets, formula patterns, cross-tab references, dashboard layouts, conditional formatting on categorical data, dynamic ranking tables, and batch-wrapper gotchas — all derived from end-to-end builds verified to render cleanly.
